title: More Menu (Part 1/1)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier/ Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block. | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier/ Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block, West Tripura during FY 2025-26. | 26/12/2025 | 01/01/2026 | |
| District Magistrate and collector – West Tripura, Government of Tripura invites Online Tenders through E-Tender from Individual supplier/Agency/Firm for Supply and Delivery of Ride on Roller. | District Magistrate and collector – West Tripura, Government of Tripura invites Online Tenders through E-Tender from Individual supplier/Agency/Firm for Supply and Delivery of Ride on Roller. | 27/05/2025 | 10/06/2025 | |
| Notice Inviting e-tender for supply of stationery articles for the use of office of the District Magistrate and Collector, West Tripura District. | Notice Inviting e-tender for supply of stationery articles for the use of office of the District Magistrate and Collector, West Tripura District. | 01/05/2025 | 12/05/2025 | |
| Notice Inviting Tender for reputed/resourceful authorised Dealer/Cooperative/Lamps/Firms/Govt. Supplier/Supplier of electronics goods/Agencies for office equipment under Mandwi RD Block | Sealed quotations are hereby invited from reputed/resourceful authorised Dealer/Cooperative/Lamps/Firms/Govt. Supplier/Supplier of electronics goods/Agencies for office equipment under Mandwi RD Block | 20/03/2025 | 25/03/2025 | |
